meta.promotionPolicy: Only promote to data/database.json when official/high-trust source rows and athlete identity are unambiguous. Ambiguous same-name rows remain candidates only.

openPullRequestsChecked.title: Add Numata completion report generator
openPullRequestsChecked.overlapAssessment: Non-overlapping report-only work. It does not change athlete histories, data/database.json, data/research-candidates.json, A4 layout, or v5.9.6_LOCK.

recentMergedWorkChecked.title: Add Lot6-10 audit research batch
recentMergedWorkChecked.overlapAssessment: Adjacent previous batch only. No Lot 11-13 coverage.

sourcesChecked.label: PL Commentary Bank main data/database.json roster skeleton
sourcesChecked.purpose: Confirm Lot 11-13 roster identities, team names, divisions, declared bests, aliases, and v5.9.6_LOCK metadata.

sourcesChecked.label: Repository open PR search
sourcesChecked.purpose: Avoid duplicate or conflicting work before adding the isolated batch file.

sourcesChecked.label: HPA official annual result PDF 2024
sourcesChecked.purpose: Row-level official-source sweep for Lot 11-13 names across Hokkaido domestic three-lift PL and single bench results included in the 2024 annual result PDF.

sourcesChecked.label: Exact-name high-trust search sweep
sourcesChecked.purpose: Checked HPA/JPA/IPF/Goodlift/APF-AAPF style exact-name terms for spaced/unspaced Japanese names and romanized aliases. No additional promotable or unambiguous official rows were identified in this narrow pass.

researchCandidates.findingSummary: Official same-name row found in the 2024-11-17 第2回北海道・東北ブロックベンチプレス選手権大会, C group: M3-CL 66kg candidate, 十勝パワーリフティング協会, bodyweight 65.10, BP attempts 120.0 / 125.0 / -132.5, best 125.0, total 125.0, place 1, points 71.43. Kept candidate-only because the 2026 Numata Lot 13 athlete identity should be reviewed before database promotion.
researchCandidates.separationNote: Bench-only candidate. Do not merge with three-lift PL history or referee/officiating appearances. Same PDF also contains 谷口 孝仁 as technical controller/referee in other meet sections; those are not athlete performance histories and are not candidates for database athlete histories.

noAdditionalFindings.result: No additional official/high-trust athlete performance row identified in this narrow pass.
No additional official/high-trust athlete performance row identified in this narrow pass.

validation.runtimeValidation: not required; isolated research-log JSON only
validation.promotionValidation: no confirmed histories promoted; no identity inference performed
